form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of 11 months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Previously first up; third of 11 at this track 2yo Mdn-Sw February 27 2025 over 1000m, 0.9 len behind Raff Vader with 58kg at $14. Expecting a strong run while fresh.
